title: A.N.O.M.A.L.Y
body:
![MainDescription](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74d8cd307add7cfcd74be5c50f26f57e24ab2a5d.png)

# ⚠️ WARNING ⚠️
**This mod is still in very early development so things most likely will change. BUGS WILL BE PRESENT!**

# A.N.O.M.A.L.Y

## Information
A.N.O.M.A.L.Y adds [REDACTED] anomalies to your world, your goal is to find these anomalies and mark them down on your checklist. But be careful.. these anomalies have harmful tendancies.

## Features
- Many anomalies to your world
- Shader Effects
- Custom Sound Effects
- Custom Entity Models

## Planned Features
- Anomaly Checklist [⌛]
- More Anomalies [⌛]
- AnomalyDex
- and More...
